objective: Design a full autonomous trading bot for MetaTrader 5 (MT5), optimized for Apple Silicon (M5 Pro, 24GB RAM), trained on domain knowledge from an Obsidian vault and iteratively self-improved using structured research and error-correction frameworks.

krqs.title: What are the viable methods to connect Python on macOS to MT5 running in a Windows environment, and what are the trade-offs of each approach?
krqs.acceptance_criteria: At least 3 distinct bridge methods identified with latency/reliability trade-offs documented

krqs.title: Which backtesting frameworks are ARM-native or perform well on Apple Silicon, and how do they compare in speed, features, and ease of use?
krqs.acceptance_criteria: At least 3 frameworks benchmarked with feature comparison table

krqs.title: What architectures exist for self-improving trading bots that iterate on strategy parameters using mechanical metrics?
krqs.acceptance_criteria: At least 2 documented architectures with iteration loop design

krqs.title: What risk management frameworks and production safeguards are standard for autonomous trading systems?
krqs.acceptance_criteria: At least 5 safeguards documented with implementation patterns

krqs.title: What are the memory and CPU optimization patterns for running a trading bot + backtesting loop concurrently on a 24GB unified memory system?
krqs.acceptance_criteria: Memory budget allocation documented with parallelism patterns
